article_title: Flashpoint Report Finds Agentic AI Discussions on Criminal Forums Surged 1,500 Percent as Infostealers Fuel 3.3 Billion Stolen Credentials

content_preview.title: Flashpoint Report Finds Agentic AI Discussions on Criminal Forums Surged 1,500 Percent as Infostealers Fuel 3.3 Billion Stolen Credentials
content_preview.summary: Flashpoint's 2026 report documents a 1,500 percent spike in AI-related criminal forum activity, 3.3 billion stolen credentials from infostealers, and a 53 percent rise in ransomware incidents.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Flashpoint's [2026 Global Threat Intelligence Report](https://flashpoint.io/blog/global-threat-intelligence-report-2026/), released on March 11, documents what the company describes as a point of "total convergence" in cybercrime, where malware, identity theft, and infrastructure exploitation have collapsed into a single high-velocity threat engine.
